{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Verge
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Verge]] is a location that [[Suriel]] pulled transports back into.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
